channel.title: Registries on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Registries on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Automatic Dependabot access to GitHub-hosted registries
item.description:
Dependabot can now read from private GitHub Packages registries without a personal access token when the package has granted repository access through “Manage Actions access.” This removes the need to configure a PAT for that dependency source.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Deployment Templates support packaging deployment configurations in registries for curated deployment
item.description:
Azure Machine Learning deployment templates now support public preview deployments from registries. This expands the registries that can be used as the source for a templated deployment.

  • Source: Azure Updates
